response.overview: This experimental documentary depicts the tentative, complex relationship between a sister and brother as they struggle to integrate a shared human connection into pre-ordained power imbalances of the patriarchal family order. Through home-footage and tangentially-related imagery of context clues, the story will follow an incident that finally ruptures the precarious connection between the main characters, prompting the viewer to question the endurance and legitimacy of outdated traditions. Present notions of ‘manhood’ and ‘honor,’ as they figure in the youth circles of present-day Prishtina, reproduce inherited injustices, amplified through the desire-driven culture of late-stage capitalism.
response.title: Ill - Endowed
